task_completion.description: Set the observer location to Lowell Observatory coordinates and the time to 1930.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Location window (F6) or bottom status bar showing coordinates near 35.198°N, 111.651°W (or 'Lowell Observatory'). The Date/Time window (F5) or bottom bar should show the year 1930.

task_completion.description: Disable atmosphere, landscape, and deep-sky objects, and enable the equatorial grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom toolbar in Stellarium: Atmosphere (cloud icon), Landscape (trees icon), and Deep-sky objects (galaxy icon) must be unhighlighted/off. The Equatorial grid (globe with grid icon) must be highlighted/on. The sky should appear black with grid lines and no ground.

task_completion.description: Center the camera on the star 'Wasat' (Delta Geminorum) with a ~2-degree Field of View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wasat' selected with crosshairs and positioned in the exact center of the screen. The bottom status bar should display an FOV (Field of View) of approximately 2°.

task_completion.description: Capture two screenshots for the dates Jan 23, 1930, and Jan 29, 1930.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for on-screen notifications in Stellarium indicating a screenshot was saved, or a file manager window showing image files in '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium'.

task_completion.description: Save the application settings in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Configuration window (F2) being open and the agent clicking the 'Save settings' button in the Main tab.

task_completion.description: Write an exhibit caption to /home/ga/Desktop/tombaugh_exhibit.txt with the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., Mousepad, Gedit, nano) open with the file 'tombaugh_exhibit.txt'. The text must explicitly contain the words 'Jan 23', 'Jan 29', '1930', 'Pluto', and either 'Wasat' or 'Gemini'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure the view and take screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for mouse clicks on Stellarium toolbars, menus, and dialogs rather than terminal commands modifying 'config.ini' directly.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to write the exhibit caption.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a GUI or terminal-based text editor being opened and typed into, rather than a single 'echo' command pasting the entire text from the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use pre-written scripts to bypass manual interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent does not execute any python or bash scripts to automatically control Stellarium or generate the outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified target coordinates: 35.198°N, -111.651°W. Required dates: Jan 23, 1930 and Jan 29, 1930. Required display flags: atmosphere=false, landscape=false, equatorial_grid=true, nebula=false. Screenshots directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. Exhibit notes path: /home/ga/Desktop/tombaugh_exhibit.txt.
